name: Paracetamol
details: Pain reliever and fever reducer. Dosage: 500mg tablets. Take 1-2 tablets every 4-6 hours as needed.

name: Ibuprofen
details: Anti-inflammatory medication. Dosage: 200mg tablets. Take with food. Maximum 1200mg per day.

name: Amoxicillin
details: Antibiotic for bacterial infections. Dosage: 250mg capsules. Take as prescribed by doctor.

name: Aspirin
details: Blood thinner and pain reliever. Dosage: 75-100mg tablets. Take as directed by doctor.

name: Cetirizine
details: Antihistamine for allergies. Dosage: 10mg tablets. Take one tablet daily as needed.

details: it is medicine used for astma

name: dollo-650
details: medicine used for pain killer and also fever relef dosage 650mg take after food 6-8 hr gap for using it
